momentum_breakout.description: Mid/large cap stocks with strong momentum and rising volume
momentum_breakout.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 500 AND Volume > 500000 AND RSI > 55 AND RSI < 75 AND Return over 3Months > 10 AND Price to Earning < 40 AND MACD Signal > 0

bluechip_momentum.description: Nifty 50 tier stocks with fresh momentum signals
bluechip_momentum.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 50000 AND RSI > 50 AND RSI < 70 AND Return on equity > 12 AND Debt to equity < 1.5 AND MACD Signal > 0

bluechip_value_dip.description: Large caps trading below fair value with strong fundamentals
bluechip_value_dip.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 20000 AND Price to Earning < 25 AND Return on equity > 15 AND Debt to equity < 1 AND Dividend yield > 1 AND Return on capital employed > 15

bluechip_earnings_growth.description: Large caps with accelerating earnings and sales growth
bluechip_earnings_growth.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 20000 AND Profit growth > 15 AND Sales growth > 10 AND Price to Earning < 40 AND Return on equity > 12

midcap_breakout.description: Mid-caps like BEL/TEJASNET with momentum breakout signals
midcap_breakout.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 1000 AND Market Capitalization < 20000 AND RSI > 55 AND RSI < 75 AND MACD Signal > 0 AND Return over 3Months > 10 AND Sales growth > 15

midcap_hidden_gem.description: Under-the-radar mid-caps with strong fundamentals but low analyst coverage
midcap_hidden_gem.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 500 AND Market Capitalization < 5000 AND Return on capital employed > 20 AND Profit growth > 20 AND Price to Earning < 25 AND Debt to equity < 0.5

defence_infra_play.description: Defence and infra mid-caps riding government capex cycle
defence_infra_play.screener_query: Market Capitalization > 500 AND Market Capitalization < 30000 AND Sales growth > 15 AND Profit growth > 10 AND Return on capital employed > 12 AND RSI > 45 AND RSI < 72 AND Debt to equity < 1.5

price_range_sweet_spot.description: Stocks in ₹400-700 range with solid technicals and fundamentals
price_range_sweet_spot.screener_query: Current Price > 400 AND Current Price < 700 AND Market Capitalization > 200 AND RSI > 45 AND RSI < 72 AND Return on equity > 10 AND Debt to equity < 1.5 AND MACD Signal > 0

price_range_value_picks.description: ₹400-700 stocks with low PE and dividend support
price_range_value_picks.screener_query: Current Price > 400 AND Current Price < 700 AND Price to Earning < 20 AND Dividend yield > 1 AND Return on equity > 12 AND Market Capitalization > 200
